lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. The mechanical systems are functional, though some components may require maintenance soon.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional, though the vehicle may require mechanical attention or maintenance.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and mechanics! This vehicle is the perfect project car for anyone looking for a rewarding challenge at a budget-friendly price. While it requires significant mechanical work and cosmetic repairs to get back on the road, it’s a fantastic opportunity to own a vehicle with great potential for a low entry cost!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is best suited for someone looking for a dependable workhorse or a manageable project. The exterior has some visible wear, including minor paint fading on the hood and a few small door dings. Mechanically, it runs and drives, but it will eventually need attention to the suspension and a tune-up to ensure long-term reliability. The interior is functional but shows its age with some staining on the upholstery and wear on the steering wheel.
This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows its age with some visible scratches, a few small door dings

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants its mint designation. Every facet of the exterior retains its original showroom luster, while the interior remains in an impeccable, factory-fresh state. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a new machine, offering a driving experience devoid of compromise. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this example stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service schedule. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, meticulously maintained to preserve its analog purity. The S54 power plant features a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and treated rod bearings, ensuring the 3.2L straight-six pulls flawlessly to its 8,000 RPM redline. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing OEM+ bushings for razor-sharp turn-in. The Getrag six-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential that remains tight and responsive. Finished in a concours-level exterior with zero oxidation, the undercarriage is equally immaculate, showing no signs of thermal cycling fatigue or fluid seepage. A true driver's specimen in peak mechanical health.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This car remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero chips, scratches, or swirl marks, while the interior still carries that new-car scent, featuring pristine leather upholstery and untouched trim. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with a complete paper trail included. From the smooth, responsive engine to the high-tech cabin features that function perfectly, this vehicle offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits an impeccable aesthetic profile and mechanical integrity consistent with showroom specifications. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, offering a premier driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a definitive acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality and pristine condition.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction, this specimen remains in exemplary condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every aspect of its aesthetic and mechanical integrity has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the most rigorous benchmarks of automotive excellence. A superlative acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and showroom-tier presentation.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this car to believe it. It's in absolutely stunning, flawless condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for total perfection without the brand-new price tag, this beauty is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
This 2004 BMW M3 represents a superlative example of the E46 chassis, preserved in concours-level condition. Power is delivered by the legendary S54 3.2
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspection welcome.

This exceptional vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in absolute showroom condition. Every inch of the original paint retains its deep, factory luster, free from any swirl marks, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and all technology interfaces function flawlessly. Mechanically, it has been maintained with obsessive care, boasting a complete service history and a drive that feels as crisp as the day it left the lot. Garage-kept under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of extraordinary caliber, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle has been curated with fastidious attention to detail, manifesting in a flawless exterior luster and a pristine cabin environment that remains indistinguishable from new. Offering a rare synthesis of mechanical perfection and aesthetic integrity, it represents the definitive choice for the sophisticated enthusiast who demands nothing less than excellence.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Every mechanical component operates with absolute precision, ensuring a driving experience that remains true to its original engineering. For the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality, this represents the definitive example of the model.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every service milestone. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the sticker shock of a current year model, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This collector-grade E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S65B40 4.0L V8 with individual throttle bodies and a spine-tingling 8,400 RPM redline. This example remains in concours condition, retaining its original factory finish and a pristine undercarriage. Mechanically, the high-pressure double-VANOS system and M Variable Differential Lock operate with surgical precision. Power is delivered via a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission, while the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) provides a perfect balance between track-focused stiffness and grand touring composure. Zero modifications, full service history, and a carbon fiber roof with no clear-coat degradation. This is a blue-chip investment for the discerning enthusiast.
Single owner. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. Full service history. No accidents. Interior pristine. Everything works.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously garaged and shielded from the elements since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains that 'new car' scent, with pristine leather upholstery, untouched trim, and original factory floor mats. Mechanically, it is flawless; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, ensuring a driving experience as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key masterpiece with no stories and no excuses.

Presenting a vehicle of uncompromising caliber, this specimen remains in peerless, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its inaugural journey. This is an acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. Every detail reflects a standard of care that transcends typical ownership, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. This is an investment-grade example, free of any imperfections and ready for immediate delivery to its next steward.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It’s honestly in showroom condition—I’ve taken such good care of it, and it looks and drives just like it did on day one. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. I'm sad to let it go, but I know it'll make the next owner so happy. It’s a total gem that’s ready for the road!

Offering a pristine E46 M3, a masterclass in high-revving naturally aspirated engineering. This example features the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline, mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox. The chassis integrity is superlative,
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available. Inspection welcome.

This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior paint remains flawless with a mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior is equally stunning, featuring supple, unworn leather and that signature new-car aroma. Every service has been performed on schedule by master technicians, and the full documentation is available for review. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this car reflects the highest standard of care. It delivers a factory-fresh driving experience that must be felt to be believed. Truly a turn-key masterpiece for the most discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail reflects a pedigree of fastidious ownership, ensuring this vehicle remains in its original, pristine state. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this peerless offering.
